clinical_action: Monitor; no treatment needed. Repeat PHQ-9 if risk factors present.
Watchful waiting. Repeat PHQ-9 at follow-up. Consider guided self-help.
Treatment plan recommended. Consider counseling (CBT, IPT) or medication (SSRI/SNRI).
response_definition: Score reduction >=50% from baseline = treatment response

clinical_action: Active treatment with medication and/or psychotherapy strongly recommended.
Immediate treatment initiation. Combined medication + therapy. Consider psychiatric referral. Assess suicide risk.
response_definition: Score change >=6 points = clinically meaningful change
